name: Brandwatch Consumer Intelligence API
what_it_does: Brandwatch REST API for enterprise consumer intelligence and social listening platform. Enables AI agents to query brand mentions, retrieve conversation analytics, access audience insights, monitor topics and competitors, and integrate social intelligence data into marketing and insights workflows. Brandwatch (part of Cision) is one of the largest social analytics platforms.
use_cases: Querying brand conversation volume and sentiment trends from marketing intelligence agents
Retrieving consumer insights and audience demographic data from market research agents
Monitoring competitor brand performance and market share signals from strategy agents
Integrating social analytics into executive dashboards and BI pipeline agents
not_for: Social media publishing (Brandwatch is monitoring, not publishing)
best_when: An enterprise brand or insights team using Brandwatch wants AI agents to process social intelligence at scale — surfacing trends, sentiment shifts, and competitor data into marketing and strategy workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Social mention data may contain PII. GDPR compliance required for EU audiences. Brandwatch is enterprise-priced.

auth.notes: Brandwatch OAuth 2.0 with username/password flow for API access. JWT tokens for API calls. Enterprise accounts required.

pricing.notes: Enterprise social intelligence platform now part of Cision. Significant investment.

performance.rate_limits: Brandwatch API: rate limits per account; historical queries can be slow

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Social mention data contains PII in public posts — GDPR required for EU
No public MCP server — enterprise REST API integration required
OAuth flow uses username/password (not client credentials) — requires service account
Historical data queries can be slow (minutes) — design agents with async patterns
Brandwatch data retention policies limit historical lookback on lower plans
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public social data with potential PII in mentions. GDPR compliance for EU data. SOC2. OAuth with service account credentials.

security_score_components.security_notes: Social listening data with PII in public mentions. SOC2, GDPR. EU data residency. Service account OAuth.
